title: More things
description: just adds more things like copper tool and useful crafts
body:
# more thing add
- oxidized copper ingot
- oxidized copper pickaxe
- oxidized copper sword
- stick to oak plank(3 steps)
- slab to plank(only oak for now)
- bluenium by ore or craft(5 steps for crafting)
- bluenium ore
- bluenium sword
- bluenium pickaxe
- bluenium block

and more

# stick to plank

stick to fiber

![wood fiber recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/410a534806f84639c18397d5e4f0a33c2bf6e81c.png)

fiber to panel

![fiber to panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aee41c8be7c85ec1357487dddaea662d99956aef.png)

panel to plank

![panel to plank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f115f1fe453ca7cbde44944d961aff135eb468.png)

(in future updates there will be a different craft depending on the wood that was used)
